narrative:
North Royalton-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 972 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
